## Summary

Brief description of changes.

## Type

- [ ] Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Infrastructure (`chore`)
- [ ] Performance (`perf`)
- [ ] Test (`test`)

## Scope

- [ ] Dashboard (`dashboard`)
- [ ] SDK (`sdk`)
- [ ] Agents (`agents`)
- [ ] Move contracts (`move`)
- [ ] Relayer (`relayer`)
- [ ] Scripts (`scripts`)
- [ ] CI/CD (`ci`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes with zero errors
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes with zero warnings
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes with all tests green
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] No hardcoded values — all config from environment variables
- [ ] No `console.log` in production code
- [ ] No `any` TypeScript types
- [ ] All new components handle 4 data states (loading, error, empty, success)
- [ ] Mobile responsive verified (320px to 1920px)
- [ ] Accessibility: all interactive elements keyboard-reachable

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots of visual changes.
